status: rev0: scaffolded from agentic-digital-twin; geometry not yet filled in
_README: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH. The build source (Design.cs / design_mirror.py)
MIRRORS this file: update JSON FIRST, then the mirror, never one alone.
Tag every PUBLISHED or MEASURED value with [PUB] in its sibling *_note.
Every other number is DERIVED and must trace to an anchor or sizing script.
Audits READ this file; they never re-declare these constants.

anchors_published._note: [PUB] verbatim from the spec/datasheet/measurement. Cite the source.

derivation_note: Numbers NOT in anchors_published are DERIVED. State here HOW (sizing script, scaled drawing, analytic closure). Keep them traceable; never present them as published.

geometry._note: DERIVED unless tagged. Fill in the real parametric geometry.

masses_kg._note: Mass + station (x,y,z mm) per item -> CG and inertia close in audit.py

requirements._note: Each becomes a scored check in audit.py. lower_is_better flips the score direction.
